Name: UBlueprint
Description:
Blueprints are special assets that provide an intuitive, node-based interface that can be used to create new types of Actors
  and script level events; giving designers and gameplay programmers the tools to quickly create and iterate gameplay from
  within Unreal Editor without ever needing to write a line of code.

Variables.Name: bRecompileOnLoad
Variables.Description: Whether or not this blueprint should recompile itself on load

Variables.Name: ParentClass
Variables.Description: Pointer to the parent class that the generated class should derive from. This can be null under rare circumstances,

Variables.Name: bHasBeenRegenerated
Variables.Description: When the class generated by this blueprint is loaded, it will be recompiled the first time.  After that initial recompile, subsequent loads will skip the regeneration step

Variables.Name: bIsRegeneratingOnLoad
Variables.Description: State flag to indicate whether or not the Blueprint is currently being regenerated on load

Variables.Name: SimpleConstructionScript
Variables.Description: 'Simple' construction script - graph of components to instance

Variables.Name: ComponentTemplates
Variables.Description: Array of component template objects, used by AddComponent function

Variables.Name: Timelines
Variables.Description: Array of templates for timelines that should be created

Variables.Name: InheritableComponentHandler
Variables.Description: Stores data to override (in children classes) components (created by SCS) from parent classes

Variables.Name: BlueprintType
Variables.Description: The type of this blueprint

Variables.Name: BlueprintSystemVersion
Variables.Description: The version of the blueprint system that was used to  create this blueprint

Variables.Name: bNativize_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Deprecated properties.

Variables.Name: bIsNewlyCreated
Variables.Description: Whether or not this blueprint is newly created, and hasn't been opened in an editor yet

Variables.Name: bForceFullEditor
Variables.Description: Whether to force opening the full (non data-only) editor for this blueprint.

Variables.Name: bRunConstructionScriptOnDrag
Variables.Description: whether or not you want to continuously rerun the construction script for an actor as you drag it in the editor, or only when the drag operation is complete

Variables.Name: bRunConstructionScriptInSequencer
Variables.Description: whether or not you want to continuously rerun the construction script for an actor in sequencer

Variables.Name: bGenerateConstClass
Variables.Description: Whether or not this blueprint's class is a const class or not.  Should set CLASS_Const in the KismetCompiler.

Variables.Name: bGenerateAbstractClass
Variables.Description: Whether or not this blueprint's class is a abstract class or not.  Should set CLASS_Abstract in the KismetCompiler.

Variables.Name: BlueprintDescription
Variables.Description: shows up in the content browser when the blueprint is hovered

Variables.Name: BlueprintCategory
Variables.Description: The category of the Blueprint, used to organize this Blueprint class when displayed in palette windows

Variables.Name: HideCategories
Variables.Description: Additional HideCategories. These are added to HideCategories from parent.

Variables.Name: NativizationFlag
Variables.Description: When exclusive nativization is enabled, then this asset will be nativized. All super classes must be also nativized.

Variables.Name: bDisplayCompilePIEWarning
Variables.Description: TRUE to show a warning when attempting to start in PIE and there is a compiler error on this Blueprint

Variables.Name: SearchGuid
Variables.Description: Guid key for finding searchable data for Blueprint in the DDC

Variables.Name: bDeprecate
Variables.Description: Deprecates the Blueprint, marking the generated class with the CLASS_Deprecated flag

Variables.Name: CompileMode
Variables.Description: The mode that will be used when compiling this class.

Variables.Name: UbergraphPages
Variables.Description: Set of pages that combine into a single uber-graph

Variables.Name: FunctionGraphs
Variables.Description: Set of functions implemented for this class graphically

Variables.Name: DelegateSignatureGraphs
Variables.Description: Graphs of signatures for delegates

Variables.Name: MacroGraphs
Variables.Description: Set of macros implemented for this class

Variables.Name: IntermediateGeneratedGraphs
Variables.Description: Set of functions actually compiled for this class

Variables.Name: EventGraphs
Variables.Description: Set of functions actually compiled for this class

Variables.Name: PRIVATE_CachedMacroInfo
Variables.Description: Cached cosmetic information about macro graphs, use GetCosmeticInfoForMacro() to access

Variables.Name: bDuplicatingReadOnly
Variables.Description:
Flag indicating that a read only duplicate of this blueprint is being created, used to disable logic in ::PostDuplicate,
	 
	  This flag needs to be copied on duplication (because it's the duplicated object that we're disabling on PostDuplicate),
	  but we don't need to serialize it for permanent objects.
	 
	  Without setting this flag a blueprint will be marked dirty when it is duplicated and if saved while in this dirty
	  state you will not be able to open the blueprint. More specifically, UClass::Rename (called by DestroyGeneratedClass)
	  sets a dirty flag on the package. Once saved the package will fail to open because some unnamed objects are present in
	  the pacakge.
	 
	  This flag can be used to avoid the package being marked as dirty in the first place. Ideally PostDuplicateObject
	  would not rename classes that are still in use by the original object.

Variables.Name: Status
Variables.Description: The current status of this blueprint

Variables.Name: NewVariables
Variables.Description: Array of new variables to be added to generated class

Variables.Name: CategorySorting
Variables.Description: Array of user sorted categories

Variables.Name: ImplementedInterfaces
Variables.Description: Array of info about the interfaces we implement in this blueprint

Variables.Name: LastEditedDocuments
Variables.Description: Set of documents that were being edited in this blueprint, so we can open them right away

Variables.Name: Breakpoints
Variables.Description: Persistent debugging options

Variables.Name: ComponentTemplateNameIndex
Variables.Description: Index map for component template names

Variables.Name: OldToNewComponentTemplateNames
Variables.Description: Maps old to new component template names

Variables.Name: Extensions
Variables.Description: Array of extensions for this blueprint

Variables.Name: ThumbnailInfo
Variables.Description: Information for thumbnail rendering

Variables.Name: bBeingCompiled
Variables.Description: The blueprint is currently compiled

Variables.Name: CrcLastCompiledCDO
Variables.Description: CRC for CDO calculated right after the latest compilation used by Reinstancer to check if default values were changed
